full_text:
A) Dissociation

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase and Collagenase & Hyaluronidase by Foteini.

Dispase dissociation media included 18,9 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 400 µl Dispase + 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 17,8 ml DMEM/F12+++, 2 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

(1) First RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 4 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: (1) First RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 4 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Cell counts:

B) Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 10.6 E6 cells/vial for a total of 6 vials

Sequentially dissociated cells: 5 E6 cells/vial for a total of 5 vials

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 16.4 | 6.06
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 13.6 | 4.5
 | viability [%] | 82.9% | 74.3%
 | size [µm] | 8.0 | 8.6
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 15.4 | 6.46
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 11.4 | 4.44
 | viability [%] | 74.4% | 68.8%
 | size [µm] | 7.8 | 8.5
Average | total [E6 cells/ml] | 15.9 | 6.26
total | total [E6 cells] | 63.6 | 25.04
Average | live [E6 cells/ml] | 12.5 | 4.47
total | live [E6 cells] | 50.0 | 17.88
 | viability [%] | 78.65% | 71.55%
